creator: kgunders@teamcool.net
text:
Greetings:
 
 ksh93 has been broken for longer than I can remember on amd64
 machines.  I was optimistic when I noted a finally updated version but
 alas....
 
 ===>  Patching for ksh93-20070328
 ===>  Configuring for ksh93-20070328
 ===>  Building for ksh93-20070328
 package: update /usr/ports/shells/ksh93/work/bin/execrate
 bin/package: ./pkg76056.exe: Permission denied
 package: cc: seems to be a cross-compiler
 package: set HOSTTYPE to something other than the native freebsd6.amd64
 *** Error code 1
 
 Stop in /usr/ports/shells/ksh93.
 
 
 
 -- 
 
 Best regards,
 
 Ken Gunderson
 
 "The course of history shows that as a government grows, liberty 
 decreases."  (Thomas Jefferson)
